scripts.predev:frontend: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$ErrorActionPreference='SilentlyContinue'; try { $connPids = @(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3300 | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique); foreach ($processId in $connPids) { if ($processId) { Stop-Process -Id $processId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } } } catch {}; try { if (Test-Path './frontend-gravity/.next') { Remove-Item './frontend-gravity/.next' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } } catch {}; exit 0"
scripts.dev:frontend: cmd /c "set NEXT_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1&& set NEXT_IGNORE_INCORRECT_LOCKFILE=1&& cd frontend-gravity&& node ../node_modules/next/dist/bin/next dev -p 3300"
scripts.predev:backend: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ./scripts/kill-backend-dev.ps1 && docker compose -f docker-compose.yml up -d postgres redis
scripts.check:baseline: npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:backend && npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.test:service:full: npm --prefix ./backend run test:e2e && npx playwright test
scripts.test:e2e:interaction80:headed: set PW_SLOW_MO=200&& npx playwright test e2e/interaction-coverage-80.spec.ts --headed --workers=1
scripts.test:e2e:100:core: npm run test:e2e:smoke && npm run test:e2e:journeys && npm run test:e2e:ext && npm run test:e2e:controls
scripts.test:e2e:100: npm run test:e2e:100:core && npm run test:e2e:sync && npm run test:e2e:persistence && npm run test:e2e:visual
scripts.test:e2e:100:full: npm run test:e2e:100 && npm run test:e2e:realworld
scripts.test:e2e:journeys:slow: set PW_SLOW_MO=500&& npx playwright test e2e/journeys.spec.ts --headed --workers=1
scripts.test:e2e:journeys:tier1:slow: set PW_SLOW_MO=500&& npx playwright test e2e/journeys-tier1.spec.ts --headed --workers=1
scripts.test:e2e:journeys:tier2:slow: set PW_SLOW_MO=500&& npx playwright test e2e/journeys-tier2-forms.spec.ts --headed --workers=1
scripts.test:e2e:journeys:tier2:card:slow: set PW_SLOW_MO=500&& npx playwright test e2e/journeys-tier2-student-card.spec.ts --headed --workers=1
scripts.test:e2e:journeys:tier2:schedule:slow: set PW_SLOW_MO=500&& npx playwright test e2e/journeys-tier2-schedule.spec.ts --headed --workers=1
scripts.test:e2e:journeys:tier2:dashboard:slow: set PW_SLOW_MO=500&& npx playwright test e2e/journeys-tier2-dashboard.spec.ts --headed --workers=1
scripts.test:e2e:journeys:tier2:notifications:sl: set PW_SLOW_MO=500&& npx playwright test e2e/journeys-tier2-notifications.spec.ts --headed --workers=1
scripts.test:e2e:journeys:tier2:settings:slow: set PW_SLOW_MO=500&& npx playwright test e2e/journeys-tier2-settings.spec.ts --headed --workers=1
scripts.test:e2e:journeys:tier2:portal:slow: set PW_SLOW_MO=500&& npx playwright test e2e/journeys-tier2-portal.spec.ts --headed --workers=1
scripts.test:e2e:journeys:tier2:finance:slow: set PW_SLOW_MO=500&& npx playwright test e2e/journeys-tier2-finance.spec.ts --headed --workers=1
scripts.test:e2e:journeys:tier2:booking:slow: set PW_SLOW_MO=500&& npx playwright test e2e/journeys-tier2-booking.spec.ts --headed --workers=1
scripts.test:e2e:journeys:tier2:ui:slow: set PW_SLOW_MO=500&& npx playwright test e2e/journeys-tier2-ui.spec.ts --headed --workers=1
scripts.test:e2e:journeys:tier2:auth:slow: set PW_SLOW_MO=500&& npx playwright test e2e/journeys-tier2-auth.spec.ts --headed --workers=1
scripts.test:e2e:journeys:all: npx playwright test e2e/journeys.spec.ts e2e/journeys-tier1.spec.ts e2e/journeys-tier2-forms.spec.ts e2e/journeys-tier2-student-card.spec.ts e2e/journeys-tier2-schedule.spec.ts e2e/journeys-tier2-dashboard.spec.ts e2e/journeys-tier2-notifications.spec.ts e2e/journeys-tier2-settings.spec.ts e2e/journeys-tier2-portal.spec.ts e2e/journeys-tier2-finance.spec.ts e2e/journeys-tier2-booking.spec.ts e2e/journeys-tier2-ui.spec.ts e2e/journeys-tier2-auth.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:contracts:complex: npm run test:e2e:realworld && npm run test:e2e:sync && npm run test:e2e:persistence
scripts.test:e2e:full:v3: npm run test:e2e:complex:v3 && npm run test:e2e:contracts:complex:all
